title: Breadcrumb navigation for React apps
description: Composable Breadcrumb primitives for Next.js and React—lists, links, current page markers, and separators with accessible landmarks.

og.title: Breadcrumb · Zentauri UI
og.description: Composable Breadcrumb primitives for Next.js and React with separators and current-page semantics.

twitter.title: Breadcrumb · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Composable Breadcrumb primitives for Next.js and React with separators and current-page semantics.

intro: Breadcrumbs communicate hierarchy and help users orient themselves in multi-level navigation. Compose list items, links, separators, and the current page marker to match your IA.
useCases: Admin consoles with nested settings routes.
Docs sites with section and page context.
Marketing sites linking back to primary hubs.

faqs.question: Does the breadcrumb work with the Next.js App Router?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use standard anchor hrefs or Next.js Link by composing your own link component inside BreadcrumbLink when you need client navigation.

faqs.question: How should I label the nav element?
faqs.answer: The root nav defaults to aria-label="Breadcrumb". Override it when you localize strings or need a more specific name for assistive technologies.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: The API follows a small compound pattern: list, item, link, page, and separator. Keep markup shallow and prefer tokens for spacing between items.
